retry_reason: If skb is NULL, the function is a no-op; retrying after allocating a fresh skb might be appropriate but is not a failure recovery of the put operation itself.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free an skb buffer (via dev_kfree_skb_any) and perform associated cleanup (DMA unmapping, descriptor zeroing). The put operation is one step within broader cleanup logic, not the sole purpose.
judge.retry_reason: If skb is NULL, the function is a no-op; retrying after allocating a fresh skb might be appropriate but is not a failure recovery of the put operation itself.
